metadata.description: Selamy Labs public engineering-discipline skills plus four bundled MCP servers, distributed as a versioned Claude Code plugin. Workloads declare this marketplace + enable the plugin, pinned, instead of bespoke sync.

plugins.name: selamy-skills
plugins.description: Public engineering-discipline skills (process-aware-done, iac-not-ad-hoc, yield-on-wait, technical-integrity, terraform-module-layout, grounded-generation, using-laneq, and more) plus four MCP servers (laneq, reddit, dispatch, memory).
